title: ononis arvensis subsp. spinescens
intro: Ononis arvensis subsp. spinescens, also known as Spiny Burnet, is a subspecies of the Burnet plant, a type of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The Spiny Burnet has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and is also used to treat digestive issues and menstrual disorders. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Spiny Burnet are commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
